lastOutput:
es across 6 files:**

1. **`src/types.ts`** — Added `StateChangeEntry` interface and `stateLog` field to `Ticket`
2. **`server/store.ts`** — Modified `updateTicket()` to auto-detect status changes and append to the log; seeded initial `todo` entry in `createTicket()`
3. **`server/dispatcher.ts`** — Added reason strings to all 10 status transition call sites (agent_started, agent_completed, agent_failed, user_abort, pr_merged, auto_merged, tool_approved, waiting_tool_approval, orphan_recovery, project_not_found, worktree_setup_failed)
4. **`server/index.ts`** — Added reasons to retry/abort/PATCH endpoints; added `GET /api/tickets/:id/log` endpoint
5. **`server/auditor.ts`** — Added `pr_merged` reason to the auditor's merge detection
6. **`src/components/TicketDetailModal.tsx`** — Added collapsible "State History" timeline with color-coded status icons, human-readable reasons, elapsed time between transitions, and wall-clock timestamps

https://github.com/jess-bergs/agent-kanban/pull/43
